market_pulse.one_liner: Equities slide as AI sector rotation accelerates and VIX spikes, with oversold signals emerging in semiconductors.
market_pulse.sector_rotation: Rotation out of AI/semiconductors into energy and defensives, with oil bouncing on Persian Gulf tensions.

opportunities.thesis: Oversold RSI 29.1 with massive call buying ($28.7M premium on $192.5 calls) signals institutional accumulation; AI memory sell-off overdone.
opportunities.catalyst: Samsung Q2 profit surge validates AI demand; NVDA earnings next month.

opportunities.thesis: Deeply oversold RSI 6.8, near 52-week low; cloud infrastructure demand remains robust, mean reversion likely.
opportunities.catalyst: Upcoming earnings or sector rebound from oversold conditions.

opportunities.thesis: Oversold RSI 30.4 on AI memory fears, but diversified 5G/auto exposure provides support; below moving averages.
opportunities.catalyst: Stabilization in chip sector or positive auto/5G news.

risk_alerts.alert: Escalating Ukraine-Russia tensions with strikes on cargo ships could disrupt commodities and spike risk aversion.
AI memory/chip stocks sell-off may continue if Samsung's profit surge fails to reassure; NVDA, MU at risk of further downgrades.
VIX above 16 and rising signals elevated near-term volatility; broad market drawdown possible, especially in tech.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Prolongs conflict, sustaining energy and commodity supply risks, and dampening European risk appetite.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Escalation threatens Black Sea shipping, potentially spiking grain and energy prices, and raising geopolitical risk premiums.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Astronauts return to ISS after sheltering during air leak repair attempt
geopolitical_impact.rationale: No direct market impact; isolated space station incident.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Domestic French legal/political issue with negligible global market implications.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Humanitarian tragedy but no material market or portfolio impact.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Iran footballers issued US visas for World Cup, says White House
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Sports diplomacy with minimal financial market relevance.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Zelenskyy: Putin choosing war by rejecting offer for in-person talks
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Reinforces diplomatic stalemate, maintaining elevated uncertainty in energy and European assets.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Trump hails jobs surge, says Iran talks ‘going well’
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Potential de-escalation with Iran could ease oil supply fears, but Trump comments are volatile and may reverse quickly.

immediate: Raise cash allocation to 90% given risk-off signals and VIX spike
Set limit orders for NVDA long entry in $190-195 zone with stop at $180
